recommendations.title: Raazi
recommendations.overview: An Indian spy is married to a Pakistani military officer during the Indo-Pakistani War of 1971.

recommendations.title: Soulcatcher
recommendations.overview: A military contractor hired to seize a weapon that turns people into savage killers seeks revenge when his brother falls victim to the device.

recommendations.title: M3GAN 2.0
recommendations.overview: After the underlying tech for M3GAN is stolen and misused by a powerful defense contractor to create a military-grade weapon known as Amelia, M3GAN's creator Gemma realizes that the only option is to resurrect M3GAN and give her a few upgrades, makin

recommendations.title: Land of Bad
recommendations.overview: When a Delta Force special ops mission goes terribly wrong, Air Force drone pilot Reaper has 48 hours to remedy what has devolved into a wild rescue operation. With no weapons and no communication other than the drone above, the ground mission sudden

recommendations.title: My Beautiful Laundrette
recommendations.overview: A young Pakistani Briton manages a rundown laundrette with his lover while dealing with tension in his family, the local Pakistani community, and a persistent mob of skinheads.

recommendations.title: Ek Tha Tiger
recommendations.overview: A top Indian agent is sent to observe the actions of a scientist but the mission complicates when he falls in love with the scientist's Pakistani caretaker.

recommendations.title: The Falcon and the Snowman
recommendations.overview: The true story of a disillusioned military contractor employee and his drug pusher childhood friend who became walk-in spies for the Soviet Union.

recommendations.title: What Will People Say
recommendations.overview: Sixteen year-old Nisha lives a double life. At home with her family she is the perfect Pakistani daughter, but when out with her friends, she is a normal Norwegian teenager. When her father catches her in bed with her boyfriend, Nisha's two worlds br

recommendations.title: Good Boys
recommendations.overview: A group of young boys on the cusp of becoming teenagers embark on an epic quest to fix their broken drone before their parents get home.

recommendations.title: The Reluctant Fundamentalist
recommendations.overview: In New York, a Pakistani native finds that his American Dream has collapsed in the wake of the 9/11 terrorist attacks.
